message:
bd-160: implement migration file generator

Add MigrationFormat (Sql/Rust) and MigrationWriter for generating
timestamped migration files with forward and rollback SQL. Includes
Migration::new_version() for timestamp-based versioning and
Migration::from_operations() for generating migrations from SchemaOperations
using any DdlGenerator.

- MigrationFormat: Sql (plain SQL files) or Rust (embedded const)
- MigrationWriter: configurable output directory and format
- Migration::new_version(): YYYYmmdd_HHMMSS format for lexicographic sorting
- Migration::from_operations(): converts SchemaOperations to UP/DOWN SQL
- 17 unit tests for migration generation

Also fixes unused import warnings in DDL generators.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
